ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "subj_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject participating in the trial */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* ID of the block to which the trial belongs */,
  "trial_order" INTEGER /* Order of the trial within the block */,
  "reaction_time" INTEGER /* Reaction time of the subject in milliseconds */,
  "selection_outcome" INTEGER /* Selection outcome (0 for no selection, 1 for selection) */,
  "trial_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial type */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial condition */,
  "trial_notes" TEXT /* Notes or observations during the trial */,
  "trial_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trial */,
  "trial_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_subj_id FOREIGN KEY ("subj_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subj_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES trial_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES blocks ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_trial_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_type_id") REFERENCES trial_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subj_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the subject */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the subject */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the subject */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the subject */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed */,
  "participant_type" TEXT /* Type of participant (e.g., student, volunteer) */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Health status of the subject */,
  "prior_experience" TEXT /* Prior experience with similar experiments */,
  "psychological_conditions" TEXT /* Any psychological conditions of the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subj_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "block_name" TEXT /* Name of the block */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the block */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the block */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the block */,
  "block_sequence" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the block within the trial */,
  "block_instructions" TEXT /* Instructions or tasks given to subjects within the block */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_details" (
  "trial_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial detail */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "trial_date" TEXT /* Date the trial was conducted */,
  "trial_location" TEXT /* Location where the trial was conducted */,
  "trial_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the trial was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_details_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* JSON string of role permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the trial */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the trial was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was recorded */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_notes_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Changes made in this version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_versions_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "average_reaction_time" REAL /* Average reaction time across all blocks */,
  "selection_rate" REAL /* Rate of successful selections */,
  "total_trials" INTEGER /* Total number of trials conducted */,
  "successful_selections" INTEGER /* Total number of successful selections */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_outcomes_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_condition_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_condition_mapping_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES trial_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_condition_mapping_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the trial type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trial type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_type_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_type_mapping_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES trial_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_type_mapping_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "report_created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "report_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_report_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
